pronunciation: /冒蓹 藞fe瑟m蓹s 藢d蓻f瑟藞n瑟蕛蓹n 蓹v p蓴藧r藞n蓱藧伞r蓹fi/
englishDefinitions: A well-known statement that attempts to define pornography, often discussed in law and culture.
persianTranslation: 鬲毓乇蹖賮 賲卮賴賵乇賽 倬賵乇賳賵诏乇丕賮蹖
examples: The lecture mentioned the famous definition of pornography.
People still debate the famous definition of pornography today.
The film referenced the famous definition of pornography in a legal context.
